description_long: This is an adult female pedestrian with a medium build, wearing a sleeveless halter top and fitted pants. Her hair is styled in a neat bun at the back of her head, and she has a visible tattoo on her upper back. The top is form-fitting and extends slightly below the waist, while the pants are slim and reach down to her ankles. She is wearing simple, flat shoes suitable for walking. The figure's posture is upright and relaxed, with arms resting naturally at her sides.
description: An adult female pedestrian with a halter top, fitted pants, and a bun hairstyle, standing upright with a visible back tattoo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the halter top, fitted pants, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the bun hairstyle and the form-fitting clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tattoo on the upper back and the back of the bun hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile and the relaxed arm posture.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless halter top and fitted pants
